data.body:
## Description

Create `tests/skills/test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis.sh` following the pattern of `plugins/dso/skills/preplanning/tests/test_adversarial_review_prompts.sh`.

**Files to create/edit**: (1) `tests/skills/test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis.sh` (create), (2) `.test-index` (edit — add RED marker entry)

The test validates:
- `scenario-red-team.md` prompt file exists at `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/`
- `scenario-blue-team.md` prompt file exists at `plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/prompts/`
- Red team prompt has required placeholders: `{epic-title}`, `{epic-description}`, `{approach}`
- Blue team prompt has required placeholders: `{epic-title}`, `{epic-description}`, `{red-team-scenarios}`
- Red team prompt covers three named scenario categories (runtime, deployment, configuration) with example scenarios
- Blue team prompt has filtering criteria (possible, actionable, distinct, high confidence)
- Red team output schema fields: `category`, `title`, `description`, `severity`
- Blue team preserves red team fields + adds: `disposition`, `filter_rationale`
- SKILL.md references Scenario Analysis phase (heading pattern)
- SKILL.md documents complexity threshold for scenario analysis (both threshold numbers and conditional directives)
- SKILL.md differentiates brainstorm scenario analysis from preplanning adversarial review

Test sections: `test_red_team_prompt_structure`, `test_blue_team_prompt_structure`, `test_skill_md_scenario_analysis`

**Bidirectional coverage note**: Existing brainstorm tests (`tests/hooks/test-sub-agent-guard.sh`, `tests/skills/test_brainstorm_gap_analysis.py`) test unrelated aspects (guard block, gap analysis) unaffected by scenario analysis insertion. No modify-existing-test task needed — scenario analysis is new behavior, not modified behavior.

**TDD Requirement**: This IS the RED test. It fails (RED) because no prompt files or SKILL.md changes exist yet.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py
- [ ] Test file exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/skills/test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis.sh
- [ ] Test passes bash -n syntax check
  Verify: bash -n tests/skills/test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis.sh
- [ ] Test fails (RED) when run — prompts and SKILL.md changes don't exist yet
  Verify: ! bash tests/skills/test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis.sh
- [ ] .test-index entry added for brainstorm SKILL.md with RED marker
  Verify: grep -q 'plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md.*test-brainstorm-scenario-analysis' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
